name: Divinity
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the sugar, corn syrup, water, and salt to the hardball stage, stirring constantly.
2. Pour the mixture over the beaten egg whites.
3. Add the chopped pecans and vanilla.
4. Beat until the mixture is very stiff.
5. Drop spoonfuls of the mixture onto wax paper.
6. Allow to harden.
Note: Do not make on a rainy day.
